# Skilo

Skilo is a tiny sharing layer for agent skills. It turns a local skill folder with `SKILL.md` into a shareable link, installs skills from links or refs, and supports native skill directories for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Amp, Windsurf, OpenCode, Cline, Roo, and OpenClaw.

## Canonical URLs

- Product: https://skilo.xyz
- Docs: https://skilo.xyz/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/yazcaleb/skilo
- npm CLI: https://www.npmjs.com/package/skilo-cli
- API base: https://skilo-api.yaz-b35.workers.dev

## Core CLI

- Install CLI: `npm install -g skilo-cli`
- One-off usage: `npx skilo-cli <command>`
- Share a local skill: `npx skilo-cli share ./my-skill`
- Install from a share link: `npx skilo-cli add https://skilo.xyz/s/<token>`
- Install from a registry ref: `npx skilo-cli add namespace/skill-name`
- Inspect before install: `npx skilo-cli inspect https://skilo.xyz/s/<token>`
- Publish current skill: `npx skilo-cli publish`

## Install Targets

- Claude Code: `--cc` or `--claude-code` -> `~/.claude/skills/`
- Codex: `--codex` -> `~/.agents/skills/`, `~/.codex/skills/`
- Cursor: `--cursor` -> `~/.cursor/skills/`
- Amp: `--amp` -> `~/.config/agents/skills/`
- Windsurf: `--windsurf` -> `~/.codeium/windsurf/skills/`
- OpenCode: `--oc` or `--opencode` -> `~/.config/opencode/skills/`
- Cline: `--cline` -> `~/.cline/skills/`
- Roo: `--roo` -> `~/.roo/skills/`
- OpenClaw: `--openclaw` -> `~/.openclaw/skills/`

## Supported Sources

- Local skill path
- Local `SKILL.md` or `skill.md`
- Skilo share link `https://skilo.xyz/s/<token>`
- Registry ref `namespace/name` or `namespace/name@version`
- GitHub shorthand `github:user/repo` or `github:user/repo#path`
- `.skl` bundle
- Direct URL

## Share and Trust Model

- Skills can be shared anonymously and claimed later.
- Installs verify SHA-256 checksums when verification metadata is available.
- Verified publishers can sign bundles.
- Share links can be one-time, time-limited, password-protected, or capped by total uses.

## API Notes

- Health: `GET /health`
- Share resolution: `GET /v1/skills/share/:token`
- Skill metadata: `GET /v1/skills/:namespace/:name`
- Skill tarball: `GET /v1/skills/:namespace/:name/tarball/:version`

## Recommended References

- Read https://skilo.xyz/docs for user-facing docs.
- Read https://github.com/yazcaleb/skilo for source and implementation details.
- When helping an agent use Skilo, prefer the official Skilo skill if it is installed.
